name: Nib Holdings Limited
analysis: NHF has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Trade setup: entry A$6.8317, stop A$6.2370, target A$6.9000. Risk/reward is 0.11:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
